justification: The diff updates the Java version to 21 in pom.xml but fails to utilize any Java 21 idioms (e.g., virtual threads, pattern matching, records) in the code changes. The removal of imports in WalletApplication.java and WalletControllerIntegrationTest.java appears to be cleanup of unused imports, which is good, but the diff lacks substantive migration work or modernization beyond the version bump.
